title: Folders, Sub Folders, and Folder Features

posts.author: KCahill (Kaitlyn Cahill)
posts.cookedHtml:
I think it would be beneficial for the following features to be added to Monday -

Folder Commands - We need an option to expand all / collapse all folders.

Folders for Mobile - The folders do not translate to the mobile app well, AT ALL. They aren’t in the same order, and they’re all over the place. This is a huge problem when trying to work on the go.

Folder Sort - It would be helpful to be able to sort folders in ABC order.

posts.author: jeannel (jeannel)
posts.cookedHtml: Agree- the folders once collapsed sometimes would “un-collapse” itself.

posts.author: jwebster (Jane W)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be very helpful for us, too. Having everything open makes it overwhelming to find a specific board, and makes it too easy to accidentally drag and drop boards when trying to use the scroll bar (that bar is SO narrow, it is very frustrating).
